global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT SHARED agent state, ALLOCATED & SEEDED by pointsEmit upstream (NOT by this effect — definition.js declares textures:{}). Layout [x, y, z, alive]: x,y normalized coords [0,1], w=1.0 alive flag. rgba32f full float; one texel == one agent (state texture is stateSize x stateSize). Read AND written by the agent pass (MRT outXYZ@SV_Target0); the runtime ping-pongs and persists it frame-to-frame (isStateSurface suffix _xyz).

global_vel._role: PERSISTENT SHARED agent state, ALLOCATED & SEEDED by pointsEmit upstream. Layout [vx, vy, vz, seed]: velocity stored in NORMALIZED space (vx/resolution.x) for compatibility with physical()/pointsRender; w=per-agent seed (0 => first-spawn, initialized via hash2(agent_id+99999)). rgba32f full float. Read AND written by the agent pass (MRT outVel@SV_Target1); ping-ponged and persisted frame-to-frame (isStateSurface suffix _vel).

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT SHARED agent state, ALLOCATED & SEEDED by pointsEmit upstream. Layout [r, g, b, a] agent color, passed through unchanged by hydraulic. rgba32f full float. Read AND written by the agent pass (MRT outRGBA@SV_Target2); ping-ponged and persisted frame-to-frame (isStateSurface suffix _rgba).

feedback._comment: Agent-update middleware (Common Agent Architecture). State lives in three PERSISTENT 'global_' state surfaces global_xyz / global_vel / global_rgba that are OWNED & SEEDED by pointsEmit upstream in the chain (pointsEmit().hydraulic().pointsRender()). This effect declares NO local textures (definition.js textures:{}). The 'agent' pass is fullscreen over the state texture (one texel == one agent), reads all three state surfaces + inputTex, and writes NEW state to all three via MRT (drawBuffers:3, outXYZ@SV_Target0 / outVel@SV_Target1 / outRGBA@SV_Target2). Inputs == outputs (same global_ keys), so the runtime ping-pongs each per write (ref 04 §10.2/§10.7) and they PERSIST frame-to-frame (isStateSurface: suffix _xyz/_vel/_rgba). The 'passthrough' pass is a fullscreen copy of inputTex to outputTex for 2D chain continuity. NO deposit/scatter pass (no drawMode:'points', no count/countUniform) — the points-scatter deposit lives in the separate pointsRender effect, not here. No 'repeat:' passes (no _iteration uniform). State surfaces are rgba32f (full float).
